fields.automationHelp: Jeda untuk menghentikan sementara proses di masa depan.

generator.regenerationWarningDescription: Direktori ini sudah dibuat. Memulai pembuatan baru akan mengganti item yang ada.
generator.promptPlaceholder: Jelaskan item apa yang harus dibuat untuk direktori ini...
generator.promptHelperText: Spesifik tentang jenis konten yang ingin Anda buat
generator.companyInfoDescription: Detail perusahaan opsional untuk konten bermerek
generator.categoriesDescription: Tentukan kategori dan kata kunci untuk pengorganisasian konten
generator.sourceUrlsDescription: Tambahkan URL tertentu untuk mengekstrak konten
generator.noSourceUrlsMessage: Tidak ada URL sumber yang ditambahkan. Generator akan menggunakan pencarian untuk menemukan konten.
generator.updateWithPullRequestDescription: Buat pull request alih-alih commit langsung
generator.enableBadgeEvaluationDescription: Evaluasi dan tambahkan lencana kualitas ke item
generator.aiFirstGenerationDescription: Aktifkan pembuatan item awal berbasis AI sebelum pencarian web.
generator.recreateConfirmDescription: Buat ulang akan menghapus item yang ada dan membuat ulang dari awal. Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.
generator.recreateInlineTitle: Buat ulang akan menghapus item yang ada
generator.recreateInlineDescription: Mode ini menghapus item saat ini dan membangun ulang dari awal. Lanjutkan hanya jika Anda ingin mengganti semuanya.
generator.captureScreenshotsDescription: Automatically capture screenshots or product images for each item during generation
generator.companyNameDescription: Used to personalize generated content with your brand identity.
generator.companyWebsiteDescription: AI will analyze your website to better understand your brand context.
generator.initialCategoriesDescription: Seed categories to organize items. The AI will use these as a starting point.
generator.priorityCategoriesDescription: Categories that will appear first in the generated output. Useful for highlighting important sections.
generator.targetKeywordsDescription: Keywords to guide the AI search and content generation. More specific keywords yield better results.
generator.sourceUrlsFieldDescription: Specific URLs to extract content from. If empty, the generator will search the web automatically.
generator.generationMethodDescription: Choose whether to update existing items or recreate everything from scratch.
generator.websiteRepositoryCreationMethodDescripti: How the website repository is created. Template is recommended for most cases.
generator.maxSearchQueriesDescription: Number of search queries the AI will generate to find relevant content (1-50).
generator.resultsPerQueryDescription: Maximum results to retrieve per search query (1-20).
generator.maxPagesToProcessDescription: Maximum web pages to process for content extraction (1-100).
generator.relevanceThresholdDescription: Minimum relevance score (0-1) for content to be included. Higher values mean stricter filtering.
generator.dataGenerationDescription: Configure data volume and entity generation
generator.generateCategoriesDescription: Create category structure for organizing items
generator.generateTagsDescription: Create tags for flexible item labeling
generator.generateBrandsDescription: Extract and create brand entities from items

progress.title: Pembuatan Sedang Berlangsung

advancedPrompts.title: Advanced Prompts
advancedPrompts.subtitle: Customize AI prompts for directory generation. Leave empty to use defaults.

relevanceAssessment.title: Relevance Assessment
relevanceAssessment.description: Additional instructions for filtering web pages by relevance to your directory topic.
relevanceAssessment.placeholder: e.g., Only include pages that focus on open-source projects...

itemGeneration.title: Item Generation
itemGeneration.description: Additional instructions for AI-generated initial items before web search.
itemGeneration.placeholder: e.g., Focus on enterprise-grade solutions with active maintenance...

itemExtraction.title: Item Extraction
itemExtraction.description: Additional instructions for extracting items from web page content.
itemExtraction.placeholder: e.g., Prioritize tools with official documentation links...

searchQuery.title: Search Query Generation
searchQuery.description: Additional instructions for generating search queries to find content.
searchQuery.placeholder: e.g., Include queries targeting GitHub repositories and official docs...

categorization.title: Categorization
categorization.description: Additional instructions for categorizing and tagging extracted items.
categorization.placeholder: e.g., Use technical categories like 'CLI Tools', 'Libraries', 'Frameworks'...

deduplication.title: Deduplication
deduplication.description: Additional instructions for identifying and removing duplicate items.
deduplication.placeholder: e.g., Consider items with similar GitHub repos as duplicates...

sourceValidation.title: Source Validation
sourceValidation.description: Additional instructions for validating item source URLs.
sourceValidation.placeholder: e.g., Prefer official project websites over third-party reviews...

aiChat.title: Asisten AI
aiChat.subtitle: Buat direktori dengan bahasa alami
aiChat.welcomeMessage: Halo! Saya dapat membantu Anda membuat direktori menggunakan bahasa alami. Tanyakan sesuatu seperti "Buat direktori untuk alat AI" atau jelaskan apa yang Anda butuhkan.
aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Jelaskan direktori yang ingin Anda buat...
aiChat.sendHint: Enter untuk mengirim · Shift+Enter untuk baris baru
aiChat.providerNotConfigured: Penyedia ini belum dikonfigurasi. Siapkan di Plugins.
aiChat.settingsModalDescription: Override settings for this directory. Unset fields inherit from your user settings.
aiChat.resetConfirm: This will clear all directory-specific overrides. Settings will fall back to your user-level values.

feature.title: Buat Direktori dengan AI
feature.subtitle: Buat direktori yang indah dan dapat dicari dalam hitungan menit menggunakan bahasa alami. Tidak perlu coding.
